expected.notes: Employer names match exactly between I-983 and E-Verify; the single comparison condition is not satisfied so rule must not fire.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'employer_name_mismatch', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - comparison.employer_name mismatch
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
